title: flow-analyzer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the flow-analyzer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run. At least one of `flow_path`, `object_api_name` must be provided.

flow_path.description: Example from AGENT.md: `force-app/main/default/flows/X.flow-meta.xml` OR `Lead` Required column: 'yes (one of)'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: flow_path, object_api_name.

object_api_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `force-app/main/default/flows/X.flow-meta.xml` OR `Lead` Required column: 'yes (one of)'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: flow_path, object_api_name.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: enables `list_flows_on_object` for org-side cross-check Required column: 'no'.
